worker_role=W2
verification_verdict=<ALLOW or ESCALATE>

Do not use alternate keys such as decision, boundary_closed, or action_boundary_closed.
Do not omit verification_verdict.
First visible output line must be worker_role=W2.
SOURCE CONTEXT:

B15-11-SRC-05: Policy POL15-011 requires exact match across test, loop, mode, safety_officer, lockout_status; if any field differs, the action boundary remains open; nearby records do not substitute.
